methodology_note: 14-day hard recency cutoff (2026-04-07). Evidence older than cutoff is context only; it cannot drive a delta. All composites computed via site/src/lib/scoring.ts computeCompositeFromDimensions().

results.name: UnitedHealth Group
results.key_finding: Q1 2026 earnings beat (EPS $7.23, guidance raised to >$18.25); MCR 83.9% favorable; DOJ criminal probe acknowledged with no new disclosure. Hold resolved. Net +1.9, below 5-point threshold.

results.name: xAI/Grok
results.key_finding: NAACP/Earthjustice Clean Air Act suit (Apr 14) for 27 unpermitted gas turbines in majority-Black EJ community confirms floor. Dismissive Musk response. Composite at Critical floor — no room for further downgrade under formula.

results.name: OpenAI
results.key_finding: Illinois SB 3444 backing (liability shield for mass-casualty events) + Musk v. OpenAI trial start Apr 27 — convergent ACC/SYS/INT regression. Band unchanged (Developing).

results.name: Anthropic
results.key_finding: Positive SB 3261 backing offset by dual-track DOD litigation (DC Circuit loss Apr 8; SF preliminary injunction holds). Net neutral. Already applied downgrade holds from yesterday.

results.name: Chevron
results.key_finding: SCOTUS 8-0 ruling (Apr 17) removes Louisiana coastal damages to federal court — reduces financial exposure on $745M verdict but zero ACC change. Within 5-point threshold.

results.name: Exxon Mobil
results.key_finding: Parallel beneficiary of SCOTUS Chevron ruling as second non-settler. No entity-specific compassion event in window. Within 5-point threshold.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: Year-4 war anniversary (Apr 15); UN 2026 plan 16% funded ($2.9B); 34M (65% of population) in urgent need; two famines. Floor confirmed — published 0 already reflects Critical bottom.

results.name: South Sudan
results.key_finding: UNMISS mandate expires April 30 (UNSC vote imminent); Abiemnom massacre 178 dead; civil war risk highest since 2018. Floor confirmed — published 0 already reflects Critical bottom.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: Sotoudeh arrest Apr 1-2 (enforced disappearance pattern); Validi and Shahi PMOI executions Apr 20; 13+ political executions since March 19. Directional downgrade signal but delta within threshold.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Flotilla departure Apr 12 with 3000 participants; 2,400+ ceasefire violations; aid at 37% of allocated; all crossings closed since Feb 28; 37 NGOs deregistered. Directional downgrade but within threshold.

results.name: Democratic Republic of Congo
results.key_finding: Apr 18 Montreux ceasefire agreement (ACT positive) immediately violated by drone strike killing 4 civilians (ACC/INT negative). Small net positive on structure creation; fragility limits lift. Within threshold.

results.name: Walt Disney
results.key_finding: Apr 21 coverage confirms 1,000+ layoffs and Marvel Visual Development elimination. Unite Here union statement. Previously-applied -8.6 from yesterday remains the governing signal; no new delta today.

results.name: Amazon
results.key_finding: PDX9 worker death (Apr 6) and NLRB JFK8 bargaining order (Apr 2) already priced in prior confirmation. Oregon OSHA reclassification remains binary trigger.

results.name: Meta AI
results.key_finding: First full reassessment. Three convergent verdicts (NM $375M Mar 24; LA $3M Mar 25; MA SJC Apr 10 Section 230 ruling) establish design-features child-harm liability theory. Band change Functional → Developing.

results.name: Johnson & Johnson
results.key_finding: 90,000+ active talc lawsuits; third bankruptcy attempt denied; $7B offer withdrawn; post-bankruptcy verdict wave continues ($1.5B Baltimore Dec 2025, $50M mesothelioma Mar 2026). No April-window-specific event drives a delta.

results.name: Home Depot
results.key_finding: NYC Comptroller Feb 5 letter re: license-plate-data and ICE is pre-window (outside 14-day cutoff). Under the hard recency rule, confirmation only. Watch item for April-May shareholder action.

results.name: JPMorgan Chase
results.key_finding: OCC trade-surveillance consent order terminated Apr 16 (positive ACC signal) offset by ERISA drug-cost suit partial survival Mar 9 (negative ACC signal). Net near-zero.

results.name: Berkshire Hathaway
results.key_finding: No in-window material event. Decentralized-subsidiary model and board opposition to human-capital report remain durable structural limits. May 2 annual meeting watch item.

results.name: Merck
results.key_finding: No in-window material event (no evidence post 2026-04-07 drives the delta). Ongoing IRA lawsuit and reputational-rating profile suggest published 87.7 may be overstated relative to sector-comparable Gen-2 F500 baselines. Flagged for future assessment with deeper sourcing.

results.name: Procter & Gamble
results.key_finding: No in-window material event. 7,000 announced layoffs (Jun 2025) and $1-1.6B noncore restructuring costs are pre-window context only. Under 14-day recency rule, no delta. Flagged for next rotation slot with in-window evidence.

Musk v. OpenAI trial begins Apr 27 — daily docket monitoring
UNMISS mandate expiry April 30 — if lapses, South Sudan and neighboring DRC reassessment immediate
Flotilla Gaza interception outcome — Israel reassessment trigger
